domain: outdoor gear, camping hardware, marine accessories, and rugged field equipment

ideas.product_context: Four-season expedition tents using rigid aluminum pole frameworks in high wind.
ideas.core_function: Joins multiple tent poles at fixed compound angles while a rotating cam locks each pole socket against pullout.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined central hub body with angled cylindrical sockets, cam bore, detent pockets, and drain channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires several non-coplanar angled bores, intersecting socket geometry, rotational cam clearance, asymmetric fillets, and small retention features.

ideas.product_context: Sea kayaks and fishing kayaks that mount rod holders, GPS arms, and tie-down accessories on deck rails.
ideas.core_function: Slides into a low-profile deck track and locks accessories in place with a captive wedge clamp.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined T-slot slider block with tapered wedge pocket, threaded boss, underside reliefs, and rounded rail-bearing edges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines profile-driven rail geometry, captured sliding interfaces, tapered internal features, precise edge breaks, and functional orientation constraints.

ideas.idea_title: Folding Camp Stove Pot Support Arm
ideas.product_context: Compact backpacking stoves that must support cookware while folding flat for packing.
ideas.core_function: Pivots outward from a burner body and provides a serrated support surface for pots of varying diameters.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined folding arm with hinge barrel, stop shoulder, scalloped pot-contact teeth, lightening pockets, and nested folded profile.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests hinge-axis geometry, curved serrations, thin structural ribs, weight-saving cutouts, and interference-aware folded versus deployed shapes.

ideas.product_context: Small sailboats and tenders needing controlled rope routing near a cleat without permanent line trapping.
ideas.core_function: Guides dock line or control line through a smooth open throat while allowing quick side release under slack.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined fairlead body with flared rope throat, mounting bosses, swept entry horns, countersunk fastener holes, and polished bearing radii.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires organic rope-contact surfaces, compound curves, countersinks, asymmetric open geometry, and high-radius transitions that are hard to express as simple primitives.

ideas.idea_title: Ice Axe Spike Protector Lock Collar
ideas.product_context: Mountaineering packs carrying technical ice axes with removable spike covers.
ideas.core_function: Clamps around an ice axe shaft and locks a protective spike cap so it cannot fall off during transport.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined split collar with shaped shaft channel, bayonet lug slots, pinch screw bridge, and keyed cap-retention ears.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split-body geometry, non-round channels, bayonet-slot paths, screw-clearance bridges, and mating-part retention details.

ideas.product_context: Field survey tripods, spotting scopes, and camera supports used on mud, gravel, snow, and packed soil.
ideas.core_function: Replaces a rubber foot with a folding ground spike and broad shoulder that resists twisting under load.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined foot housing with conical spike seat, transverse pivot bosses, serrated ground shoulder, drainage slots, and threaded leg socket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes coaxial threaded features, conical seats, pivot bosses, serrated terrain contact, and dirt-shedding openings in a compact part.

ideas.product_context: Scuba and cave-diving reels where line must spool evenly without snagging on the frame.
ideas.core_function: Guides braided line across the reel width while sliding on parallel rods and maintaining a rounded low-friction eyelet.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined shuttle block with twin guide-rod bores, radiused line eyelet, anti-rotation flats, and recessed wear insert pocket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests parallel precision bores, smooth internal rope-contact radii, insert recesses, sliding clearances, and compact symmetry with functional exceptions.

ideas.product_context: Hand-pump water filters used for group camping and remote field expeditions.
ideas.core_function: Transfers hand force to a pump piston while folding against the filter body for storage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined lever arm with offset pivot clevis, ergonomic thumb pad, linkage pin bore, stop tab, and hollowed underside.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires offset load paths, clevis geometry, blended ergonomic surfaces, pin alignment, stop faces, and underside shelling-like relief.

ideas.idea_title: Boat Hook Telescoping Pole Cam Clamp
ideas.product_context: Telescoping marine poles used for docking, mooring pickup, and retrieving lines from the water.
ideas.core_function: Locks nested pole sections at adjustable length using an external cam lever and shaped compression shoe.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined clamp collar with split cylindrical bore, cam-lever lugs, internal compression shoe pocket, hinge pin bosses, and anti-slip texture grooves.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split clamp mechanics, cylindrical nesting, lever pivot architecture, internal pocketing, textured grip features, and clamp-clearance tolerances.

ideas.product_context: Portable communications masts for emergency response, overlanding, and remote survey teams.
ideas.core_function: Adjusts and locks guyline tension while allowing quick release with gloved hands.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined tensioner body with angled rope channels, eccentric locking cam cavity, tie-off eye, ribbed grip flanges, and load-rated anchor hole.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines rope-path geometry, eccentric cam clearance, high-load eyelet shapes, grip ribs, and angled through-features that stress representation of functional mechanical intent.
